channel.title: Better Rule Tiles
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Better Rule Tiles

item.title: Changelog
item.description: Version 1.5.0-b3 Updated package.json Changed version from 2019.4 to 2022.3 to reflect the development version.

item.title: Changelog (Beta)
item.description: This page shows more detailed changelogs of past beta releases, if you’re looking for the release changelogs you can head over here.

item.title: ★ Tileset Editor
item.description: How to open the Tileset Editor To use the tileset editor, you first need to create a Tileset Container.

item.title: FAQ
item.description: Frequently Asked Questions My sprites get displayed as missing textures.

item.title: Welcome
item.description: Better Rule Tiles Better Rule Tiles for Unity was made to make the hassle of creating rule tiles better, easier and more intuitive that Unity’s built in solution, while also added more features which would require you to code them yourself.

item.title: Games using BRT
item.description: I’m glad so many people enjoy the tool I’ve created and use them to create amazing games! Here are a few games using Better Rule Tiles that users from the discord server have shared.

item.title: Tile Inspector
item.description: Tile inspector The tile inspector is the place where you can change the settings of the Tiles you created in the Tile drawer window.

item.title: Export Options
item.description: Export options The export options contains every setting that’ll affect the output of the exported tiles, and is also the place when you can export them.
